changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE technologies ( id serial, organization_id integer DEFAULT NULL, name character varying (255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', description text DEFAULT NULL, technology_category_id integer DEFAULT NULL, created_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, updated_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT pk_technologies PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_technologies_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_technology_to_technology_category FOREIGN KEY (technology_category_id) REFERENCES technology_categories (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_technologies_to_created_by FOREIGN KEY (created_by_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_technologies_to_updated_by FOREIGN KEY (updated_by_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION ); CREATE INDEX i_technologies_organization ON technologies (organization_id); CREATE INDEX i_technologies_technology_category ON technologies (technology_category_id); CREATE INDEX i_technologies_organization_id_name ON technologies (organization_id, name); CREATE INDEX i_technologies_name ON technologies (name);
